rationale: While there are some concerns with performance and error rates, the potential benefits of introducing a high-performance single-page checkout experience outweigh the risks. With a thorough plan in place to address latency and user experience issues, we can minimize the impact on our brand's reputation and customer satisfaction.

risk_register.mitigation: Optimize payment gateway integration, implement caching, and monitor system performance closely
Conduct a thorough investigation into the root cause of the error rate spike, allocate sufficient time to resolve the issue, and provide clear error messages to users

action_plan.action: Schedule an immediate meeting with the development team to discuss the identified issues and develop a plan to address them
Conduct A/B testing to compare the new checkout experience with the previous one, focusing on conversion rates, user satisfaction metrics, and latent performance metrics

confidence_drivers.driver: Clear risk mitigation plans in place
confidence_drivers.impact: Reduced risk of brand reputation damage and customer dissatisfaction

confidence_drivers.driver: Thorough testing and quality assurance process
confidence_drivers.impact: Increased confidence in the new checkout experience's performance and reliability
